libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are indicated. Prefer in-memory stubs/mocks for DavResource, DavSessionProvider, DavLocatorFactory, servlet requests/responses, and XML/client method objects; do not assume a live Jackrabbit repository or WebDAV server is available.

deterministic_setup.reason: The artifact exposes server-side APIs such as AbstractWebdavServlet, DavServletRequest, and WebdavRequestImpl that depend on javax.servlet types, but jackrabbit-webdav declares servlet-api as a provided dependency, so generated tests need it explicitly on the test classpath.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The 2.0-beta4 parent POM manages servlet-api as 2.3, while the existing scaffold uses 2.4; 2.4 is compatible with the current tests, but Gradle/native verification remains authoritative.
The reported failure is a native test runtime failure after image build, so setup alone may not address the failing assertions or reachability metadata needs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jackrabbit WebDAV is a generic WebDAV client/server utility library, not a standalone server. Its resolved POM marks the Servlet API as provided, while public server/request types extend Servlet classes, so meaningful server-side coverage needs the Servlet API added to the test classpath. No Docker service or environment property is indicated.
